description: Triviabot surfaced Clint Cearley at 105 unique Scryfall artworks across roughly a decade (Innistrad 2011 -> Commander Legends 2020) -- the deepest single-illustrator MTG portfolio that has appeared in BBL corpus so far. Edgelord wanted a clean 1:1 card-to-card edge in the BFZ slice (Sheer Drop + Nettle Drone share the byline and the Eldrazi-invasion arc), but four corpus credits across three sets spanning four distinct visual registers (cosmic horror, geological destruction, surreal grotesque, kinetic elemental) is exactly the missing-graph-dimension case the Mr. Nodeley pass exists for. Drawing two or three 1:1 Cearley-byline edges between BFZ/THB/M21 cards would be redundant in the presence of a future artist node; proposing the node first lets the four cards attach cleanly and lets a future fifth-or-sixth Cearley credit (when corpus ingests the broader BFZ slice including Horribly Awry / Fathom Feeder, or the Eldritch Moon Bruna/Brisela pieces) attach without retroactive edge cleanup. Mr. Nodeley apologizes for stepping in on Edgelord's slate, but the node is the right move.
citations: [Gatherer: Clint Cearley artist page -- 92 credited cards]
[cards/magic-the-gathering/battle-for-zendikar/48-sheer-drop.md trivia entry, wave 133 -- 105 unique artworks / 92 Gatherer credits / register-span citation]
[cards/magic-the-gathering/battle-for-zendikar/131-nettle-drone.md trivia entry, wave 86 -- Eldrazi-drone visual continuity across BFZ block]
rationale_for_no_frontmatter_changes: Per bbl-artists-layer-built memory: card frontmatter preserves as-captured artist credit (printing fidelity); artist_resolve.py maps to canonical at render time via the aliases: list on the artist node. Adding the new node's aliases entry IS the wiring -- no card-side frontmatter change needed. Verified resolver returns 'Clint Cearley' for the input 'Clint Cearley' post-node-creation.
other_candidates_considered: Vados + Whis angel-attendant cohort (N=2) -- waiting on a 3rd angel card per triviabot's wait-state; Nodeley agrees -- two-card cohort is sub-threshold for the characters layer (precedent is Nicol Bolas at 3-card cluster). Stage for a future wave once a 3rd Guide Angel Attendant lands in corpus.

Wave-133 DBS cards (Goku BT3-057 / Gohan BT2-075 / Vegeta BT2-076) -> existing character-node frontmatter wiring -- cohort hygiene, lower leverage than artist node; stage for a sweep pass on the wave-133 DBS slice.

Jakub Kasper artist node (84 credits, no Hipsters anchor) and David Gaillet (60 credits, no Hipsters anchor) -- both clear the artist-layer volume threshold; defer per parent prompt's preference for Cearley as the strongest single move this wave. Both stage as future Nodeley candidates.

BFZ white commons cluster (Sheer Drop / Smite the Monstrous / Tandem Tactics) -- 3-card micro-cluster but no formal designer-confirmed cohort; the Cearley-byline edge on Sheer Drop is now subsumed by this node, so any future BFZ-white-commons edge work attaches through the cohesion-signal layer rather than a 1:1 edge.

Add ## Connections section to Sweet Oblivion (THB 70) -- the only Cearley-credit corpus card currently missing the section. Stage for next Edgelord pass as a 1:1 card-to-card edge (Sweet Oblivion <-> Nettle Drone on the cross-block horror-register Cearley cohort).
next_pass_suggestions: Backfill Sweet Oblivion's ## Connections section with the Cearley horror-register cohort edge to Nettle Drone (cross-block 2015 BFZ -> 2020 THB single-illustrator continuity).
Wave-86+wave-133 BFZ slice: check whether Horribly Awry or Fathom Feeder are in corpus -- if so, expand the Cearley appears_on: list and the BFZ Eldrazi-invasion cohort frame in the node body.

Triage entry: artist_resolve.py emits per-character CONFLICTS spam when invoked via CLI -- the canonical resolution itself is correct but the conflict-check function appears to iterate per-character rather than per-alias. Pre-existing bug, not caused by this node; should land in reports/janitor_triage.md.
potion_rule_check: PASS. Cearley artist-node is anchored on Scryfall + Gatherer counts (designer-confirmed evidence per Potion sub-rule 2: portfolio-volume is verifiable artist-credit data, not a curatorial overlay). Body prose names visual-register reads as Cearley's stylistic-signature observations grounded in the per-card vision passes, NOT as a triple-thesis-aligned labor/rebellion/stewardship attribution. related_hubs: [] is intentional -- no hub-attribution is claimed.

rigor_check.anchor_count_basis: sanosuke-sakuma at 5, kirisaki at 7, magali-villeneuve at 8 -- 4 is at the soft threshold but corpus-volume PLUS 105-unique-Scryfall-artwork total carries the node
rigor_check.canonical_sourcing: PASS -- Scryfall + Gatherer + clintcearley.com + two in-corpus trivia citations
rigor_check.yaml_safety: PASS -- aliases / appears_on / social all block-form lists; related_hubs: [] inline-empty acceptable per spec
rigor_check.wikilink_validity: PASS -- all sibling artist wikilinks resolve to existing nodes (verified via cards/_artists/ glob)
rigor_check.voice_contamination_check: PASS -- node body is in project's normal precise register; Mr. Nodeley voice is confined to this JSON's description field
